XMSN - XM SPORTS NATION

OPRAH & FRIENDS

XM ARTIST CONFIDENTIAL(r)

======================================================================
DISCOVER SOMETHING THAT TURNS YOU ON
======================================================================

XM has more of everything you love - more commercial-free music, more 
sport play-by-play - plus, news, talk and entertainment and more. 
There's something for everyone to love with XM. 

New on XM! 

XM Sports Nation - Sports talk superstars powered by Sporting News 
Radio and racing's biggest stars - Dale Earnhardt Jr., Jimmie Johnson 
and many others. 

Oprah & Friends - A brand-new XM channel hosted by Oprah and her 
friends - Gayle King, Dr. Mehmet Oz, Jean Chatzky, Robin Smith and 
Dr. Maya Angelou. 

Artist Confidential(r) - XM's George Taylor Morris sits down with 
the most important names in music for candid one-on-one interviews, 
live music and conversation. Featured artists have included 
Paul McCartney, Sting and Coldplay. 

======================================================================
GETTING XM IS EASY
======================================================================

1. FIND YOUR RADIO - For your car, home or on-the-go

2. PICK YOUR PLAN - Monthly, annual and family plans available 

3. ACTIVATE  - Enjoy XM
